entity: Damian Lillard 71 PTS vs Houston Rockets on 2023-02-26 (POR 131-114; the 9th-highest single-game point total in NBA history, surpassed only by Wilt, Kobe, David Robinson, and the other 70+ club members)

query_target.sql: SELECT pts FROM analytics_player_game_complete WHERE full_name = 'Damian Lillard' AND game_date = '2023-02-26' AND pts = 71

notes: Active player (still in NBA as of 2025-26 with MIL/LAC); use match:gte per the active-player convention since stats can be revised. SQL pins date and exact PTS to locate the row, then extract[0].pts is asserted >= 71.
